title: Chapter 408
content:
Chapter 408 -53: Poverty

Hanzhou couldnжѕЦТфЏ help but give a sideways glance, his puzzled look seeming to say, жѕЦТињaoist Fellow Ning Zhuo, didnжѕЦТфЏ you just say that you wanted to establish a cordial relationship with Hua Guzi? Why are you now acting so aloof, rejecting her from a thousand miles away?жѕЦ

Ning Zhuo sensed HanzhouжѕЦТфџ confusion, but he didnжѕЦТфЏ explain and simply bypassed Hua Guzi.

Hanzhou: ?!

He secretly took a deep breath of cold air, feeling quite odd.

In his view, Hua Guzi obviously wanted to befriend Ning Zhuo, smooth over their relationship, but unexpectedly, Ning Zhuo turned out to be the one showing a cold face.

жѕЦТиЋiven Hua GuziжѕЦТфџ temperament, to come over so humbly and even bring dumplings along, she has already broken the norm.жѕЦ

...

жѕЦТихoung Master Ning Zhuo actually treats her like this, itжѕЦТфџ as if heжѕЦТфџ rubbing her face in the dust.жѕЦ

жѕЦТихoung Master Ning Zhuo is a bit unwise.жѕЦ

жѕЦТијhжѕЦ whatжѕЦТфџ going on here?жѕЦ

Hanzhou felt that the matter could have been handled well, but Ning Zhuo behaved quite oddly.

He subconsciously kept his distance from Hua Guzi, to prevent the latter from getting angry and recklessly starting a fight.

Hua Guzi still maintained her bow, with her upper arms, upper body, and face parallel to the ground.

ТйАтаГТйБтЄЂТйЪТЕЅТйБ?co

Her face was flushed red, feeling both angry and embarrassed, and very strange.

жѕЦТиЕejected! IжѕЦТфЮe done all this, and he still rejects me!жѕЦ

жѕЦТиџжѕЦТфЮe been rejected! I canжѕЦТфЏ believe IжѕЦТфЮe been rejected!!жѕЦ

жѕЦТијh ah ah!жѕЦ

жѕЦТифo shameful, itжѕЦТфџ too shameful.жѕЦ

жѕЦТиБot only was I rejected, but it was also seen by others. IжѕЦТфЊ going to die!жѕЦ

жѕЦТиџжѕЦТфЊ going to die, is there a crack in the ground, I want to crawl into it!!жѕЦ

жѕЦТиЌehehe, hahaha, guguжѕЦ№И╣Рѓг

жѕЦТи▓hy? Why would Young Master Ning Zhuo reject me? Can he really bear to reject me, such a cute and beautiful lady?жѕЦ

жѕЦТи▓hy? Why do I also feel a little happy?жѕЦ

жѕЦТиЊven being rejected by Young Master Ning Zhuo, I still feel very happy.жѕЦ

жѕЦТи▓hy is this happening?жѕЦ

жѕЦТиГhis brat, heжѕЦТфџ trampled my face into the mud, he deserves to die, should be killed!жѕЦ

жѕЦТиЈut, but, butжѕЦ why canжѕЦТфЏ I hate him?жѕЦ

Hua Guzi herself was also puzzled.

And so was Ning Zhuo.

жѕЦТиГhis female cultivator is crazy!!жѕЦ Ning Zhuo sensed the extreme joy in Hua GuziжѕЦТфџ heart, and the chill in his heart grew thicker, his steps involuntarily quickened.

жѕЦТиГhis half-demon has a very warped nature and is definitely not normal!жѕЦ

жѕЦТифtay away from her, it feels safer.жѕЦ

Ning Zhuo warned himself in his heart.

Hanzhou remained on high alert the entire way.

It wasnжѕЦТфЏ until he had put a safe distance between them that he looked back and saw Hua Guzi, still frozen in place like a statue, that his sense of fear and trepidation grew stronger.

Hua Guzi seemed like a Thunder Explosion Talisman, about to explode at any moment!

Ning Zhuo returned to his own Cave Mansion and temporarily put thoughts of Hua Guzi out of his mind, beginning his daily routine of cultivation.

Mirror Stand Spirit Communication Technique, Five Elements Qi Regulation Art, Demon-infused Bloodline Technique!

He cycled through the three Cultivation Techniques, steadily advancing his cultivation level.

Inside the Cave Mansion, the abundant Spiritual Energy was so dense that it accumulated into mist. He grabbed handfuls of Spirit Food, chewing and quickly turning them into Essence and Spiritual Power.

The incense burned quietly, soothing the mind, and the cushion he sat on was a joint reward from the Fire Persimmon Immortal CityжѕЦТфџ three families, still effective to this day.

After completing his cultivation, Ning Zhuo slowly opened his eyes and sent a sound transmission to Sun Lingtong, sighing, жѕЦТиЈoss, is there any way to speed up cultivation? Up to now, my cultivation level is still only at the Foundation Establishment Early Stage, which is too slow!жѕЦ

Sun Lingtong was drinking water when he heard this and almost spat it out, жѕЦТиЪittle Zhuo, why do you feel itжѕЦТфџ slow?жѕЦ

жѕЦТихou have innate talent, a Five Elements Spirit Root, all sorts of resources, and your cultivation level progresses visibly every day. This speed is already first-class, far surpassing mine back in the day. And you still think itжѕЦТфџ slow?жѕЦ

Ning Zhuo sighed, жѕЦТиџ feel like IжѕЦТфЊ still far from reaching the Foundation Establishment Mid-Stage.жѕЦ

Hearing this, Sun Lingtong felt speechless, rolled his eyes, and looked up at the ceiling, transmitting back, жѕЦТиГhatжѕЦТфџ how it is at the Foundation Establishment stage.жѕЦ

жѕЦТи▓ith every major realm increase in cultivation, the speed of cultivation will slow down by several times, or even more. This is because after a qualitative change, the foundation required for each major realm increases by dozens or hundreds of times!жѕЦ

жѕЦТиГhe more superior the Cultivation Technique, the deeper the foundation required. That is why cultivators who practice superior Cultivation Techniques can overpower cultivators of the same level.жѕЦ

жѕЦТиГhink about what level your Three Superior Sect Techniques are. Top-notch among the top-notch.жѕЦ

жѕЦТифo, stop thinking about the good old days of the Qi Refinement Realm and just keep at it. Cultivation is such that you must persist and work hard without cease.жѕЦ

жѕЦТиџt will take at least several years for you to advance to the Foundation Establishment Mid-Stage.жѕЦ

жѕЦТињonжѕЦТфЏ rush things; you need to adjust your mindset!жѕЦ

Ning Zhuo sighed. жѕЦТијh, boss, I know youжѕЦТфЎe right, but I just canжѕЦТфЏ help feeling anxious and impatient.жѕЦ

жѕЦТиДerhaps itжѕЦТфџ because IжѕЦТфЊ so eager to improve my cultivation level and increase my strength, so I can better save my mother.жѕЦ

жѕЦТиЈoss, I often think, if I had the combat power of a Nascent Soul level, I could simply discuss directly with Lin Bufan. Why bother competing on Little Struggle Peak?жѕЦ

Sun Lingtong rolled her eyes. жѕЦТињaydreaming, arenжѕЦТфЏ you!жѕЦ

жѕЦТиџжѕЦТфЊ also saying, if I were at Nascent Soul level, no, even with a Golden Core level cultivation, I would have the confidence to steal all of Lin BufanжѕЦТфџ possessions.жѕЦ

жѕЦТихou and I are of an age where such cultivation levels would already leave ninety-nine percent of our peers in the dust. You shouldnжѕЦТфЏ be so hard on yourself, Little Zhuo.жѕЦ

Ning Zhuo sighed. жѕЦТиЈoss, I also know itжѕЦТфџ unrealistic. If I rush my cultivation progress too much, itжѕЦТфџ nothing but impatience and shortsightedness. One must lay a solid foundation in cultivation.жѕЦ

жѕЦТиј towering skyscraper starts from the ground up; if the foundation is unstable, no matter how high the building, thereжѕЦТфџ a huge hidden danger of it collapsing.жѕЦ

жѕЦТиџtжѕЦТфџ just that IжѕЦТфЊ feeling frustrated inside, and thatжѕЦТфџ why IжѕЦТфЊ telling you this.жѕЦ

Sun Lingtong fell silent for a moment before consoling, жѕЦТиџ see you making rapid progress lately, growing visibly every day. Feeling frustrated about this seems quite unjustified. If word got out, countless talents and direct disciples would be so ashamed they wouldnжѕЦТфЏ know where to hide their faces.жѕЦ

жѕЦТиГhis Little Struggle Peak is a treasure trove for you. You should stay here and make good use of it.жѕЦ

After a pause, Sun Lingtong continued, жѕЦТиЌowever, wanting Nascent Soul level combat power isnжѕЦТфЏ entirely impossible.жѕЦ

жѕЦТихouжѕЦТфЎe so skilled in Mechanical Techniques; why not create a Mechanical Body with Nascent Soul level combat power?жѕЦ

At the mention of mechanical constructs, Ning ZhuoжѕЦТфџ tone immediately brightened, and his expression revealed pleasure and relaxation.

He said, жѕЦТиЈoss, the validation of my martial arts mechanical constructs on Hua Guzi has been successful.жѕЦ

жѕЦТиГhis is a great inspiration for designing a Mechanical Body for the Mengye Tiger!жѕЦ

жѕЦТиџ can start by selecting a cultivation technique for it, and then design its Mechanical Body based on that technique.жѕЦ

жѕЦТиџts practice of the Meat Tank Blood Swallowing Demon Skill in life is definitely unsuitable; itжѕЦТфџ hard to match with mechanical materials.жѕЦ

жѕЦТиГhe Suffering Scripture, on the other hand, would work.жѕЦ

жѕЦТиГhe Mechanical Fist and Feet I used in battle this time were mainly made of Bitter Water and Solitary Seed Wood. The former is thanks to support from Hanzhou, and the latter comes from the market of Little Struggle Peak.жѕЦ

жѕЦТиљonstructed from these materials, the Mechanical Fist and Feet are somewhat close to the physical body of Hanzhou and can even enhance the martial arts of the Suffering Body.жѕЦ

жѕЦТиГhe Suffering Scripture canжѕЦТфЏ match the innate talent of the Mengye Tiger. However, what the Suffering Scripture can do, other cultivation techniques should also be able to accomplish.жѕЦ

Sun Lingtong stroked her chubby chin with her plump little hand, pondering seriously, жѕЦТиЪittle Zhuo, given your current relationship with the Ten Thousand Medicine Sect, itжѕЦТфџ probably not good to look to them for another cultivation technique.жѕЦ

Ning Zhuo said, жѕЦТиџжѕЦТфЮe thought about it; we can go to an Immortal City, where there surely is a Complete Book Pavilion. We can select a cultivation technique from there to match with Mengye Tiger.жѕЦ

Sun Lingtong said, жѕЦТибengye Tiger reached Golden Core level in life; if you want to select a cultivation technique, you should at least aim for that level, right? And that wonжѕЦТфЏ be cheap.жѕЦ

Ning ZhuoжѕЦТфџ expression changed slightly.

Sun Lingtong went on, жѕЦТиџ should remind you, the previous effort to rush the Spiritual Plant Cabin has already spent a large sum of funds.жѕЦ

жѕЦТиБext, to construct the Mechanical Body for Mengye Tiger, even the lowest tier Golden Core level technique will cost a large sum of money.жѕЦ

жѕЦТи▓e need to nurture the Spirit Hidden Willow, and the Spirit Soil and Spiritual Liquid in the Spiritual Plant Cabin are almost exhausted.жѕЦ

жѕЦТиГhen thereжѕЦТфџ the cost of our daily cultivation, which most Loose Cultivators canжѕЦТфЏ even dream of, on par with direct disciples from prestigious sects. Just three months of that is already a huge amount.жѕЦ

жѕЦТијnd finally, the Ten-Thousand-Li Travelling Dragon! WeжѕЦТфЎe running low on Fire Essence and need a large replenishment.жѕЦ

жѕЦТиџ previously stole Li JingqingжѕЦТфџ fortune, but compared to this shortfall, itжѕЦТфџ merely a drop in the bucket.жѕЦ

Ning ZhuoжѕЦТфџ expression changed again and again.

Using the Nascent Soul level Ten-Thousand-Li Travelling Dragon was indeed comfortable, but the cost was too high.

The reserves Ning Zhuo had accumulated in Fire Persimmon Immortal City were starting to feel inadequate for the Ten-Thousand-Li Travelling Dragon.

To advance his cultivation, the daily consumption of spiritual energy and Spirit Food, converted into Spirit Stones, involved a lofty standard.

Then think about the Spirit Hidden Willow.

Ning Zhuo began to turn pale.

Such a legacy treasure usually relies on the support of an entire sect or family. Relying on ourselves alone is quite difficult indeed.

Ning Zhuo muttered sincerely.

Through deceiving, no, painstakingly and strategically, he had gathered much sustenance for cultivation.

But compared to the needs, these resources were far from sufficient!

For the short term, Ning Zhuo and Sun Ning could maintain their status quo.

But it wouldnжѕЦТфЏ be for too long.

Without long-term planning, one will suffer in the near future; they need to address this issue now. Otherwise, once the problem becomes pressing, it will be very hard to resolve.

Ning Zhuo furrowed his brow deeply.

These past days, he had been immersed in grueling special training, indulging in the thrill and sense of achievement that came with his rapid personal progress and had not given these issues any thought.

With Sun LingtongжѕЦТфџ reminder, he immediately understood that as time went on, this problem was becoming more serious.

If they waited until the problem escalated, it would be far too late!
